case_title: KIEREN HARLOW ET AL VS. JOHN GREEN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $85.00 - SERVED AUG-28-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, JOHN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2021 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-01-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-01-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. . PLAINTIFF KIEREN HARLOW IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF JOHN OWENS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN GREEN IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER MOTION TO VACATE IS TENTATIVELY GRANTED PENDING ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT
ORDER RE: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT - DENIED. DEFENDANT, JOHN GREEN DID NOT APPEAR. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARLOW, KIEREN OWENS, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREEN, JOHN $2,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,235.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JOHN GREEN IS TENTATIVELY GRANTED. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. CONTINUED TO JUN-08-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFFS KIEREN HARLOW AND JOHN HARLOW ARE NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOHN GREEN. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO BRING ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE SUPPORTING HIS CLAIM FOR THE VACATE. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY HARLOW, KIEREN OWENS, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GREEN, JOHN HEARING SET FOR MAR-30-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR, DEFENDANTS MOTION TO VACATE IS DENIED. DEFENDANT JOHN GREEN DID NOT APPEAR. JUDGMENT FROM 2-2-21 IS REINSTATED.
